# xenios

xenios is the AI-adjunct operations system for coaches, trainers, and practitioners.

The xenios agent runs the back office: programs, intake, check-ins, messaging, education, billing, network, outcomes.

The xenios client agent is a pocket coach for the practitioner's clients, athletes, and patients. It speaks in the practitioner's voice. It hands clinical or out-of-scope items back to the practitioner, every time.

xenios is built by Xenios Technologies, Inc., headquartered in Austin, Texas. Founded by Alex Houston. The team comes from operators behind $710M+ in prior exits, including FinDox and InstaMed.

Audience: coaches, trainers, and practitioners doing the work upstream of disease. Twenty-five categories across performance, longevity, recovery, nutrition, and clinical care.
